allow: PowerShell($tools = @{}; foreach \($t in 'scoop','winget','choco','npm','node'\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $tools[$t] = if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { 'NOT FOUND' } }; $tools.GetEnumerator\(\) | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $dest = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\supabase-cli"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; $archive = "$env:TEMP\\supabase.tar.gz"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://github.com/supabase/cli/releases/download/v2.95.4/supabase_windows_amd64.tar.gz' -OutFile $archive; tar -xzf $archive -C $dest; Get-ChildItem $dest | Format-Table Name, Length)
